allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement Two Sum solution using hash table approach

- Add optimal O\(n\) time and O\(n\) space solution
- Use HashMap to store complements for single-pass lookup
- Include three test cases covering different scenarios
- Solution handles duplicates and negative numbers correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement Contains Duplicate solution using HashSet

- Add optimal O\(n\) time and O\(n\) space solution
- Use HashSet for efficient duplicate detection
- Early exit optimization when duplicate found
- Include four test cases with edge case coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
